achievements.title: King of my World
achievements.description: Earn the King of Games rank and beat the game.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Children's Card Gaming 101
achievements.description: Complete every tutorial.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Helping the Dropout
achievements.description: Get a special promotion by beating the gym teacher in a duel.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Merry Christmas
achievements.description: Get a Christmas present from your dorm's headmaster.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: New Year's Duel
achievements.description: Win a duel with a friend on New Year's Day.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: A New Hero Summoned
achievements.description: Beat Jaden's new deck.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Pride of the Elite
achievements.description: Beat an upset Chazz and his friends in a duel after declining his attempts to duel you.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Battle Against Chazz
achievements.description: Beat Chazz in a duel and switch dorms with him.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: The Professor
achievements.description: Beat Jaden in a duel for Chazz's friends.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Chazz Reborn
achievements.description: Beat Chazz when he's representing a rival school.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Old Memories
achievements.description: Win a duel against Zane after learning about Syrus' history with the card ''Power Bond''.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: The Power of the Emperor
achievements.description: Have Crowler personally witnes you beating Zane in a duel.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: A Friend's Concern
achievements.description: Beat a friend in a duel when he tries to cheer you up after becoming a shut-in.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: A Suspicious Character
achievements.description: Win a duel with Alexis and her friends to prove your innocence after getting caught around the Girl's Dorm after dark.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Suspicious Classmate
achievements.description: Earn 1,000 DP for answering Gerard's questions correctly.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Occult Recommendation
achievements.description: Become a Seance Duelist by beating Torrey with one of his decks.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Psycho Shocker
achievements.description: Beat the spirit possesing Torrey in a duel.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Dark Fiend Deck
achievements.description: Beat the Shadow Duelist after Crowler sends him after you.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Brier and Beauregard
achievements.description: Beat the duo after eavesdropping on their plans.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: The Goblin King
achievements.description: Beat Brier and Beauregard in an ante duel.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Draw, Draw, Draw
achievements.description: Beat Damon in a duel after he comes out of hiding.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Yugi's Legendary Deck
achievements.description: Beat the thief that stole Yugi's deck in a duel.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: The Walk Home
achievements.description: Win a duel after walking home with a classmate.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Lectured by Sartyr
achievements.description: Receive a ''short'' lecture after not talking to him for months and then beat him in a duel.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Help Ms. Dorothy
achievements.description: Miss an exam by helping out the card shop owner and collect your reward.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Pharaoh's True Power
achievements.description: Beat Banner's cat, Pharaoh, in a duel.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: A Missing Hero
achievements.description: Win a duel with Jaden after learning Blair's secret.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: The Power of a Maiden's Love
achievements.description: Witness Blair sneaking into Zane's room and then beat her in a duel.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: The 7th Deck
achievements.description: Bastion has a brand new deck and wants to test it out, show him he still has a long way to go.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Duel Festival
achievements.description: Win the Duel Academy Dueling Festival.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Battle for the Chocolate
achievements.description: Win the Choco-Duel Jamboree.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Clearing Out Slifer Red
achievements.description: Beat everyone in Slifer Red at least 10 times.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Clearing Out Ra Yellow
achievements.description: Beat everyone in Ra Yellow at least 10 times.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Clearing Out Obelisk Blue
achievements.description: Beat everyone in Obelisk Blue at least 10 times.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Card Collector
achievements.description: Collect every card in the game and view them in your trunk.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Quick Thinker
achievements.description: Complete every timed duel.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: The Duel King
achievements.description: Beat Chancellor Sheppard in a duel and be given the option to change your name.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: First-turn Kill
achievements.description: Beat your opponent on your first turn.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Ultimate Defence
achievements.description: Win a duel without losing a single life point.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Honour Student
achievements.description: Get a perfect score on your exams.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: 2 Minutes. 2 Minutes Is All I Can Spare to Play With You.
achievements.description: Beat your opponent in less than 2 minutes.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues
